title: Responses Runner V2 Run Manifest

schema_version.description: Schema version identifier for this artifact contract.

run_id.description: Stable identifier for one workflow run.

run_name.description: Human-readable run name used in local artifact paths.

workflow_id.description: Stable identifier for the workflow that owns this artifact.

workflow_manifest_path.description: Repository-relative path to the workflow manifest used for this run.

workflow_manifest_sha256.description: SHA-256 digest of the workflow manifest used for this run.

run_dir.description: Repository-relative path to the local run directory.

started_at.description: Describes the `started_at` field for this artifact contract.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this artifact was last updated.

status.description: Current lifecycle status for this artifact.

current_stage_id.description: Stage currently active or most recently processed.

stage_order.description: Ordered list of stage identifiers in the workflow.

primary_job_inputs.description: Highest-authority task inputs supplied by the workflow or operator.

reference_context.description: Lower-authority contextual files attached to aid interpretation.

review_bundles.description: Describes the `review_bundles` field for this artifact contract.

skip_token_count.description: Describes the `skip_token_count` field for this artifact contract.

operator_overrides.description: Runtime inputs or overrides supplied by the operator.

stages.description: Per-stage run summaries recorded in execution order.

stage_id.description: Stable identifier for the workflow stage.

stage_number.description: One-based stage number within the workflow.

gate.description: Describes the `gate` field for this artifact contract.

stage_dir.description: Describes the `stage_dir` field for this artifact contract.

status.description: Current lifecycle status for this artifact.

checkpoint_path.description: Repository-relative path to the stage checkpoint used for classification.

input_manifest_json_path.description: Repository-relative path to the resolved stage input manifest JSON.

response_markdown_path.description: Describes the `response_markdown_path` field for this artifact contract.

response_markdown_sha256.description: Describes the `response_markdown_sha256` field for this artifact contract.

response_json_path.description: Describes the `response_json_path` field for this artifact contract.

response_json_sha256.description: Describes the `response_json_sha256` field for this artifact contract.

structured_output_path.description: Describes the `structured_output_path` field for this artifact contract.

structured_output_sha256.description: Describes the `structured_output_sha256` field for this artifact contract.

review_bundle_path.description: Repository-relative path to an approved review bundle.

review_approved.description: Describes the `review_approved` field for this artifact contract.

approved_from_status.description: Describes the `approved_from_status` field for this artifact contract.

token_preflight_path.description: Describes the `token_preflight_path` field for this artifact contract.

description: Responses Runner V2 Run Manifest JSON schema.
